desc:
Foundation is a large settlement in Fallout 76 and the main base for the Settlers. It was built on the ruins of a pre-war tourist attraction in the Savage Divide region. Led by Paige, the Settlers built the settlement as a haven and a stronghold after arriving in Appalachia, and it serves as the focal point for the main questline involving the Settlers and their rivalry with the Raiders at Crater.
Grid F4 (X: 2309, Y: 1294)
